# Abdullah Kamran - Full Stack Developer

Self-taught software engineer and Full Stack Developer based in the United Arab Emirates. Specializes in performance-optimized client-side architectures, lightweight web experiences, and raw Neo-Brutalist digital product design.

## Technical Philosophy & Architecture
- **Vanilla Performance Engineering:** Built as a standalone, high-performance static page using zero-dependency semantic HTML5, custom ES6+ JavaScript, and utility-first Tailwind CSS configuration. Employs preloaded fonts (`JetBrains Mono`, `Space Grotesk`) to avoid heavy SPA framework footprint, optimizing for instant render states and high responsiveness.
- **Neo-Brutalist Interface Design:** Uses high-contrast typography scaling, stark layout borders, dot-grid radial background patterns, hard box shadows (`boxShadow: { 'hard': '4px 4px 0px 0px #000' }`), and signature raw neon hex accents (#FBFF48 Neo-Yellow, #FF70A6 Neo-Pink, #3B82F6 Neo-Blue, #33FF57 Neo-Green, #A855F7 Neo-Purple, #FF9F1C Neo-Orange, #FF2A2A Neo-Red).
- **Interactive Mechanics:** Features a custom client-side cursor tracking node with dynamic CSS matrix transforms and mix-blend-mode adjustments, an asynchronous fluid marquee loop, dynamic scroll-reveal intersection observing, and a client-side window progress bar tracker.

## Core Technical Stack
- **Languages:** JavaScript (ES6+), Python, C++, Java, Kotlin
- **Web Architectures:** Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, JSON, APIs, WebGL
- **Game Engines & Prototyping:** Unity, Twine
- **Mobile Environments:** Android Studio, Gradle
- **Data Science:** Kaggle (RandomForestClassifier, predictive model training)
- **Creative Suites & Layouts:** Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, UX/UI, WordPress, Material Design, Remix Icons

## Production Engineering & Selected Works

### 1. Dekor (E-Commerce Platform)
- **URL:** https://dekorfurniture.vercel.app/
- **Description:** A minimalist, fully functional web platform for authentic Swedish furniture design configurations.
- **Stack:** Frontend (HTML5/Tailwind/Three.js), Backend architecture, MongoDB database integration, and custom secure payment wall implementation.

### 2. Prime Real Estate (Corporate Platform)
- **URL:** https://prime-marketing-two.vercel.app/
- **Description:** Comprehensive online real estate showcase framework modeled initially alongside real-time asset data pipelines and trading layout capabilities.
- **Stack:** Frontend layout, Three.js spatial components, MySQL database querying, and responsive Tailwind UI styling.

### 3. Al Habibi Bakery (B2B Landing Engine)
- **Code Repository:** https://github.com/4bdulllahhexe/Al-Habibi-Bakery.github.io.git
- **Description:** Custom performance-tuned business landing page built to initialize automated local lead generation funnels.
- **Stack:** WebGL render modules, vanilla frontend architecture, and Three.js environmental layouts.

### 4. SuperCar App (Android Architecture)
- **Asset Hub:** https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1AAui8mtSlI0Icuko635WuqXJL2-oai_4?usp=sharing
- **Description:** A dedicated mobile wiki application compiling historical logs, design languages, and specifications for global supercar manufacturers.
- **Stack:** Native Android environment, Kotlin, Java compilation, and Material-UI design patterns.

### 5. Dragon & Knights (Indie Game Production)
- **URL:** https://a6dullah.itch.io/dragons-knights
- **Description:** An independently constructed side-scrolling action indie game implementing physics loops and custom environmental state layers.
- **Stack:** Unity Engine, C++ scripting patterns, custom 2D sprite animations, and local velocity mechanics.

### 6. Stroke Prediction Engine (Machine Learning Notebook)
- **Kaggle Notebook:** https://www.kaggle.com/code/abood186/stroke-prediction-using-randomforestclassifier
- **Description:** A classification model trained to isolate patient diagnostic risk parameters and accurately calculate acute brain stroke probability.
- **Stack:** Python data structures, Kaggle dataset kernels, RandomForestClassifier execution, and MySQL target tables.

### 7. Hallways (Interactive Fiction Production)
- **Asset Hub:** https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Ddc5JVyv-Wa_dSpraJdL7n838MO633_5?usp=sharing
- **Description:** A text-driven psychological branch-logic survival horror game presenting dynamic choices leading to multiple unique endings.
- **Stack:** Twine core logic, custom engine HTML5 structure, semantic styling, and Adobe layout assets.

### 8. Trivia App (API-Driven Productivity Prototype)
- **Code Repository:** https://github.com/CodeLab-II/skills-portfolio-4bdulllahh.git
- **Description:** An interactive quiz application making automated third-party API queries to serve randomized trivia modules separated across complex operational difficulties.
- **Stack:** Android Studio interface, Gradle builds, Kotlin routines, and asynchronous API integrations.

## Professional Milestone Log

### Full Stack Developer | Self-Employed (Dec 2025 - Present)
- Assumes complete product ownership across full product life cycles—translating initial mockups into deployment-ready backend logic and custom client application instances.
- Manages client-facing feedback structures, version-control pipelines, and production release windows independently.

### Web Developer | Freelancer (Jun 2023 - Dec 2025)
- Orchestrated web visibility projects and scalable layouts for independent businesses, establishing localized lead pipelines.
- Transformed early corporate ideas into clean production code while growing an active engineering network during early university training.

### Sales Manager | Uniformers (Jun 2022 - Present)
- Directs client conversions, communication strategies, and contract completions.
- Maximized operational downtime to master web mechanics, self-teaching frontend logic to deploy web environments and streamline customer feedback routes.

- **Masters in Data Science** | In-Progress (2026 - Present). Emphasizes classification mechanics, dataset curation, and scalable neural architectures.
